expectations.evidence: Lists 19 skills across both systems with agent system labels

expectations.text: Classifies each skill into one of the 9 categories
expectations.evidence: Every skill has a category from the taxonomy (Product Verification, Library & API Reference, etc.) with category number references

expectations.text: Provides per-skill individual scoring (not just a generic summary)
expectations.evidence: Each skill has individual section with X/Y score and full checklist table
Categories missing section identifies scaffolding, data fetching gaps. Structural issues section covers rp/review overlap.
Quick wins with P1/P2/P3 priority. Per-skill findings grouped by score.
Specific suggestions like 'extract rp-cli boilerplate into shared reference file', 'follow self-test and agent-browser as models for trigger phrases'

expectations.text: Uses N/A appropriately for short/behavioral skills instead of penalizing them
expectations.evidence: self-test scored 5/5 with Gotchas, Progressive Disclosure, Avoids Obvious all N/A'd. mcporter and new-task similarly handled.
